brandDescription: Hyundai is a leading automotive manufacturer known for innovative design, advanced technology, and reliable vehicles. With a strong presence in the Indian market, Hyundai offers a wide range of SUVs, electric vehicles, and passenger cars that combine style, performance, and cutting-edge features. From the iconic Venue and Creta to the sporty i20 N Line and futuristic IONIQ 5, Hyundai continues to push boundaries in automotive innovation.

models.name: Venue 1.2 Kappa Petrol MT
models.description: The all-new Hyundai VENUE is here to redefine the SUV experience. Driven by bold design, advanced innovation, and the spirit of Tech Up. Go Beyond., it marks the beginning of a thrilling new chapter in urban mobility. Dimensions – 3,995 mm L x 1,800 mm W x 1,665 mm H. Fuel tank capacity - 45 L. Body style - Sub-compact SUV.

models.name: Creta Electric 42 kWh
models.description: Hyundai CRETA Electric is here. Just when India's changing mindset and infrastructure are turning it into an unstoppable force. For a generation that can't wait to lead, the iconic SUV in its electric avatar is here to take driving pleasure to the next level. Dimensions – 4,340 mm L x 1,790 mm W x 1,655 mm H. Frunk - 22 L. Range - 420 km. Battery - 42 kWh.

specifications.batteryType: Liquid cooled Lithium Ion battery pack
specifications.regeneration: Paddle shifters for adjustable regenerative braking
